---
title: "Session 7: Prompt Design: Zero-shot vs Few-shot"
subtitle: "Day 3 · Prompt Design & Iteration (3-1)"
format: revealjs
metadata-files:
  - _slides.yml
---

<!-- STUB DECK — structure only; content to be filled in before the course. -->

# Session 7: Prompt Design: Zero-shot vs Few-shot

## 📋 Agenda

- Prompt-design principles
- Zero-shot vs. few-shot prompting
- Strategies for effective prompt engineering

## 🎯 Learning Objectives

By the end of this session, you will be able to:

<!-- to be added -->

# Prompt-design principles

## Prompt-design principles

<!-- to be added -->

# Zero-shot vs. few-shot

## Zero-shot vs. few-shot

<!-- to be added -->

# Effective prompting strategies

## Effective prompting strategies

<!-- to be added -->

# Any questions?
